Subject: How do I reset MFA?
Requester Comment: I moved phones and cannot get the login code. How do I reset MFA?
Latest Agent Reply: Open Profile, Security, then reset the MFA device after verifying the backup code.

Subject: Login code never arrives
Requester Comment: The login code is not reaching my email. Can I use a backup code?
Latest Agent Reply: Ask the user to verify the backup email, then resend the MFA code from Security settings.
